plugin.name: Web Scraper
plugin.description: Extract rows from public static HTML pages with CSS selectors, in-app previews, and optional export.
title: Web Scraper
description: Extract rows from public static HTML pages with CSS selectors, review them in-app, then optionally export the filtered results.
url.label: Start URL
item_selector.label: Item Selector
title_selector.label: Title Selector
link_selector.label: Link Selector
text_selector.label: Text Selector
next_selector.label: Next-Page Selector
max_pages.label: Max Pages
timeout.label: Timeout (s)
output_format.label: Export Format
table.title: Title
summary.ready: Enter a page URL, add at least one item selector, and run the scraper.
summary.success: Visited {pages} page(s) and extracted {count} item(s). The current filter shows {visible} row(s). Right-click the table to copy fields, open URLs, or export the visible results.
summary.empty: No matching items were extracted from the current scrape.
details.empty: Select a result row to inspect its source, page URL, link, and extracted text.
details.title: Title
dialog.missing.title: Missing Input
dialog.missing.url: Enter a page URL to scrape.
dialog.missing.item_selector: Enter a CSS selector for the items you want to extract.
dialog.export.title: Export Failed
error.invalid_url: Enter a valid http:// or https:// URL.
error.missing_item_selector: Enter a CSS selector for the items you want to extract.
error.invalid_pages: Max pages must be a whole number between 1 and {limit}.
error.invalid_timeout: Timeout must be a positive number of seconds.
error.invalid_selector: One of the CSS selectors is invalid: {error}
error.dependencies: Web Scraper dependencies are missing. Reinstall the updated requirements for requests and beautifulsoup4.
error.timeout: The request timed out after {seconds} seconds.
error.request: The page could not be fetched: {error}
error.export: The results could not be exported: {error}
log.pagination_end: Stopping because no next-page link matched the selector.
log.pagination_repeat: Stopping because pagination repeated a page URL: {url}
log.fetch_timeout: Stopping after a later page timed out: {url}
log.fetch_http: Stopping after a later page returned an HTTP error: {url}
log.fetch_error: Stopping after a later page failed to load: {url}
log.done: Scrape complete. Visited {pages} page(s) and extracted {count} item(s).
